title: 秋華賞の後に・この気持ちを歌う

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess put all the strength she had
into the race, and the result reflected her efforts.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Well, Trainer, I'm off to perform Brilliant Phantasia.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If you fall asleep during my performance, I'll
clobber you over the head, so pay close
attention, all right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Very good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kawakami Princess sings Brilliant Phantasia in a loud, resounding voice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the audience responds with sheer
exhilaration.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Everyone! Thank you so much for coming to see
my performance tonight!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Thank you! This was the best!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Well, there's something else that I want to
tell you all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: For... For my next goal...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I intend to win the Queen Elizabeth II Cup, like a
true princess!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooow!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I was young, I always strove to become
a princess! And this race is the stage where that
dream will finally come true!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So I hope to have your continued support! Will
you celebrate with me when I claim first place?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Boy, I'm really looking forward to this year's
Queen Elizabeth II Cup. Sweep's going to enter
too, right?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I heard it on that TV program! A fierce
battle between those two will be a must-watch
spectacle!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
...She's so selfish. Why's she gotta act like she's
the only one on stage?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Not everyone here's rooting for her. I've got my
own heroine!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm going to become my ideal princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's why I hope you'll accompany me along the
path that I carve out!
